Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HUNTER PYLE, ESQ. OF SUNDEEN SALINAS & PYLE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF NICOLE PEDROIA.
APPEARANCE: HUNTER PYLE, ESQ. OF SUNDEEN SALINAS & PYLE 510/663-9240 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltf; pltf Nicole Pedroia also present.
RULING: In camera hearing. Court ordered proceedings/transcript under seal. Argued and the Court granted the motion. Order signed in open court. Counsel turned over his file to plaintiff on the record. (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
